title: 有馬記念の後に・まさかの二強超え

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek defeats Oguri Cap and Tamamo
Cross to win the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the post-race interview, she reflects on our
hardships and how those trials have helped us
grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells the reporters that for her next goal, she
would like to take part in a race she has always
dreamed of—the Osaka Hai.
